title: Grok16 2.0 — Single fabric knowing
motto: One belt die. One field amplitude. One linear time. Knowing is fixed-size — not nested fields.
declaration: Single fabric is the 2.0 technology: parallel I/O may fan in, but truth collapses to one amplitude on one belt.

single_fabric.rule: Chunked redata belt + single-location reads — no monolithic blast, no field-on-field stack
single_fabric.knowing: Fixed-size belt dispatch — operator truth is one fabric amplitude, not nested depth layers

warning: DO NOT CREATE FIELD FILES — they heat neighboring fields; use 2D auto-field platform

safety.field_sanity: integral one_pass_simplify — classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort
